seoTitle: Kuluin vs Kumbarilla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kuluin and Kumbarilla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kuluin and Kumbarilla.
heading: Kuluin vs Kumbarilla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kuluin, Queensland and Kumbarilla, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kumbarilla has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Kuluin (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kuluin or Kumbarilla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kuluin has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Kumbarilla scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kuluin scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Kumbarilla scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kuluin or Kumbarilla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kumbarilla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
